description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build Project that runs on pull requests and pushes to the master branch. The workflow has three jobs: build, build_d2d, and build_android. The build job uses a matrix to build the project on windows, ubuntu, and macos platforms in Release configuration. The build_d2d job builds the project on ubuntu with Direct To Display. The build_android job builds the project for Android in Release configuration using a container.
